sanitizers.expression: $wpdb->prepare('select * from ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' where code like %s', array(esc_sql($code)))
$wpdb->prepare('select * from ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' where email like %s', array(esc_sql($email)))

$wpdb->prepare(
            'INSERT INTO ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' (email,info,code,is_activate,extra) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %d, %s);',
            array(
                esc_sql($data['email']),
                esc_sql($data['info']),
                esc_sql($data['code']),
                esc_sql($data['is_activate']),
                esc_sql($data['extra'])
            )
        )
$wpdb->prepare('select * from ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' where email like %s ', array(esc_sql($email)))

$wpdb->prepare(
            'SELECT * FROM ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' ORDER BY %s %s LIMIT %d, %d;',
            array(
                esc_sql($orderby),
                esc_sql($order),
                esc_sql($limit),
                esc_sql($per_page)
            )
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
            'update ' . self::TABLE_NAME . ' set email= %s, info= %s, code= %s, is_activate= %d, extra= %s  where id= %d;',
            array(
                esc_sql($data['email']),
                esc_sql($data['info']),
                esc_sql($data['code']),
                esc_sql($data['is_activate']),
                esc_sql($data['extra']),
                esc_sql($id)
            )
        )
esc_attr( __( 'Thank you, you have successfully registered !', 'mailin' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    'SELECT * FROM ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' WHERE pID = %d AND lang= %s',
                    array(
                        esc_sql($pID),
                        esc_sql($lang)
                    )
                )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    'SELECT * FROM ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' WHERE frmID = %d AND pID= %d',
                    array(
                        esc_sql($frmID),
                        esc_sql($pID)
                    )
                )

$wpdb->prepare(
                'INSERT INTO ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' (frmID,pID,lang) VALUES (%d, %d, %s)',
                array(
                    esc_sql($frmID),
                    esc_sql($pid),
                    esc_sql($lang)
                )
            )
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT * from " . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . " where email = %s and frmid = %d",array(esc_sql($email),esc_sql($formID)))
$wpdb->prepare( 'update ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' set info= %s where id= %d;', array( $data['info'], esc_sql( $data['id'] ) ) )
$wpdb->prepare('update ' . $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_NAME . ' set doi_sent= %d where email= %s;', array(esc_sql(1), esc_sql($email) ))
esc_attr('Your e-mail address is only used to send you our newsletter and information about the activities of %s. You can always use the unsubscribe link included in the newsletter.', 'mailin')

esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Confirmation message', 'mailin' ), __( 'You can choose to send a confirmation email. You will be able to set up the template that will be sent to your new suscribers', 'mailin' ) ) )

esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Double Opt-In', 'mailin' ), __( 'Your subscribers will receive an email inviting them to confirm their subscription. Be careful, your subscribers are not saved in your list before confirming their subscription.', 'mailin' ) ) )

esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Final confirmation', 'mailin' ), __( 'This is the final confirmation email your contacts will receive once they click on the double opt-in confirmation link. You can select one of the default templates we have created for you, e.g. \'Default template - Final confirmation\'.
For your information, you cannot select a template with the tag {{DOUBLEOPTIN}}.', 'mailin' ) ) )
esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Success message', 'mailin' ), __( 'Set up the success message that will appear when one of your visitors surccessfully signs up', 'mailin' ) ) )
esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'General message error', 'mailin' ), __( 'Set up the message that will appear when an error occurs during the subscritpion process', 'mailin' ) ) )
esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Existing Suscribers', 'mailin' ), __( 'Set up the message that will appear when a suscriber is already in your database', 'mailin' ) ) )
esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Invalid email address', 'mailin' ), __( 'Set up the message that will appear when the email address used to sign up is not valid', 'mailin' ) ) )
esc_html( SIB_Page_Home::get_narration_script( __( 'Required Field', 'mailin' ), __( 'Set up the message that will appear when the required field is empty', 'mailin' ) ) )
esc_html( _n( 'Web push is currently active, you have %s subscriber.', 'Push is currently active, you have %s subscribers.', $push_app->getSubscribers(), 'mailin' ) )

esc_url( add_query_arg( array(
                                                        'page' => sanitize_text_field( $_REQUEST['page'] ),
                                                        'action' => 'edit',
                                                        'pid' => absint( $pID ),
                                                        'lang' => sanitize_text_field( $language['language_code'] )
                                                    ) ) )

esc_url( add_query_arg( array(
                                                    'page' => sanitize_text_field( $_REQUEST['page'] ),
                                                    'action' => 'edit',
                                                    'id' => absint( $exist ),
                                                    'pid' => absint( $pID ),
                                                    'lang' => sanitize_text_field( $language['language_code'] )
                                                ) ) )
